content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”2/3″]

Titanium Minerals

Dr Kojovic spent a decade working with all the Australian titanium minerals producers through instrument development, process control and site based experimental work. His technical involvement includes modelling and simulation of magnetic and electrostatic separation, Magstream, process control and instrumentation development. In 2001 he received the IEAust National Project Excellence Award for the successful CNC gauge development he managed during his time at the JKMRC. He also served as a member of the Standards Australia Committee MN/4, Heavy Mineral Sands.

[/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][/vc_row]
